caption: A news broadcast features a panel of people seated at a long table in an indoor setting with a white screen in the background. The people are dressed in a mix of formal and traditional attire, including white kurtas and Nehru jackets. On the left side of the screen, vertical banners list names like "डिप्टी CM", "सब्रत चौधरी", and "विजय सिन्हा". On the right side, "मंत्री" is written above rotating portraits of different officials, including "संतोष सुमन", "प्रेम कुमार", and "डॉ. प्रेम कुमार", alongside names like "सुमित कुमार" and "जय चौधरी". A red headline banner at the top reads "कांग्रेस चटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाक़ी है". A red ticker bar at the bottom includes a logo and a timestamp of "10:05 PM". Across the sequence, the seated panel remains static while the individual portraits and names in the side banners change.
